message:
test(proptest): add property tests for context_budget and intervention_console (ft-3681t.9.4, ft-3681t.9.5)

- proptest_context_budget.rs: 28 property tests + 3 unit tests covering serde
  roundtrips, pressure tier classification, tracker utilization, compaction
  history eviction, recovery guidance, registry aggregation, snapshot serde
- proptest_intervention_console.rs: 34 property tests + 3 unit tests covering
  serde roundtrips, pane control state transitions, approval queue lifecycle,
  emergency stop semantics, audit trail invariants, state count consistency,
  snapshot serialization
- Close beads ft-3681t.9.4, ft-3681t.9.5, and ft-3681t.9 epic (all 7 children done)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
